name: Potato & Smoked Chicken Hash
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Jalapeno Tabasco sauce or 1 teaspoon Tabasco
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic; cook gently until they are tender.
3. Add the cubed potatoes; increase the heat slightly and brown them lightly.
4. Add the diced smoked chicken to the skillet and mash the ingredients together with the potato.
5. Stir in the Tabasco sauce and milk or yogurt, then season with salt.
6. Add the chopped coriander and taste. Adjust the seasoning if necessary.
